happyThoughts.quote: Quinn was knowledgeable, professional and resolved my issue (duplicate profiles) promptly.
Super fast response and resolution to an issue! Thank you.
Could be faster but very good attention

turns.text: I can help you with duplicate player profiles! To get started, could you let me know which of the following applies to your situation?
My own duplicate profiles

Got it! I'll help you get your duplicate profiles merged.

To move forward, I'll need a few details:

1. **Your full name**
2. **Your preferred account email address**
3. **Profile links or Player IDs** for both profiles (if you have them) — or just the display names if you don't have the URLs

Could you share those?
Chenyu Zhou

Thanks, Chenyu! Could you also provide:

1. **Your preferred account email address**
2. **Profile links or Player IDs** for both profiles (or display names if you don't have the URLs)
[email]
Thanks! Now could you share the profile links or Player IDs for both profiles? If you don't have the URLs, just let me know the display names and locations for each.
There is a profile that belongs to my daughter but I cannot access it, i guess I should merge it. Also, it does not show her matches since september. is there a way to include them?

I can certainly help you get your daughter's profiles merged. Once her account is sorted out, our team can also help look into those missing matches [location].

To get started with the merge request for your child's profiles, I'll need a few details:
- Your full name and preferred account email address
- Your daughter's location
- The links (or Player IDs) to the profiles that need to be merged (if you don't have the links, the exact display names will work)

Once I have those, I can get a ticket created for our support team to review!

Full name: Blanca Díez Martín
Account email address: [email]
Location: Barcelona, Spain
the to the profile: https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/3843016?t=1

Thank you, Blanca. Just to make sure I have everything correct for the support team, could you provide the link or exact display name for the *other* profile that needs to be merged with the one you just shared? 

Also, please let me know which of the two profiles you would like to keep as the primary one.
This new profile: https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/5932895

Thank you for providing that second link. Here is a summary of the details I have collected for our support team:

Name: Blanca Díez Martín
Email: [email]
Location: Barcelona, Spain
Profiles to merge: https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/3843016 and https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/5932895
Issue: Merge duplicate profiles for your daughter and look into missing matches since September.

Is there anything else you need help with today, or should I go ahead and submit?
go ahead and submit

Your support ticket has been submitted successfully — your ticket number is #830966.

Our support team reviews duplicate profile reports manually, so it may take a few business days to process depending on volume. They will also look into the missing matches [location]. You will be notified via email once the review is complete or if they need any additional information.

In the meantime, please don't create any new accounts or make significant changes to her profiles while the request is under review. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
that's it. thanks
You're very welcome! If you need anything else in the future, don't hesitate to reach out. Have a great day!
I can help you with Pro Tennis Tour (PTT) inquiries! Let me connect you with the right information.
What would you like to know about Pro Tennis Tour? Here are some common topics I can help with:
PTT Tour Card

I don't have specific details about the PTT Tour Card in my knowledge base at this time. I wouldn't want to give you inaccurate information, so I'd recommend connecting you with a human support agent who can provide the correct details.

To get you to the right place, could you share the following:

- Your full name
- Your email address
- A brief summary of your question about the PTT Tour Card
- Your UTR profile link (if available)
